title: Basque Bean Wrap
description: A flavorful and nutritious wrap filled with Basque-style beans, perfect for a quick lunch or snack.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the Basque and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the beans, intense, salt, and pepper. Cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Warm the wrap in the skillet for 30 seconds on each side.
Assemble the wrap by spooning the bean mixture onto the center of the wrap.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrap to form a tight cylinder.
